blended.narrative: Jay Peak is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 4,485 ft. Looking ahead, 26 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 4" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
